# L2 Domain

Get default properties of [all](./DomainL2All.md) L2 Domains in selected APIC.

Filter options:
  - [name](./DomainL2Name.md)

Output options:
  - [default](./DomainL2All.md)
  - [json](./DomainL2OutputJson.md)

Command options

```
DOC_TEMPLATE:get_aci_domain_l2.help:output
```
